description: Automated DJ mix pipeline — template-based ALS generation with multi-signal cue candidate detection (Rekordbox phrases + librosa energy + PWV5 waveform) feeding bass-to-bass transition planning

orchestrator.purpose: Main pipeline controller. --visualize mode for phrase verification

warping.purpose: Per-beat warp markers from Rekordbox grid; sec_to_clip_beats + grid_bpm_and_downbeat (the one-clock converter used by stem-section cuts)

als_generator.purpose: Template-based ALS patching, multi-clip per track for loops + viz

rekordbox_reader.purpose: Manual PSSI binary parser for Rekordbox 7 phrase data + PQTZ beat grid

rekordbox_waveform.purpose: PWV5/PWV4 parser — 3-bit RGB + 5-bit height per pixel (LSB-first 16-bit words)

features.purpose: Per-beat librosa RMS + bass + PWV5 with disk cache (path/mtime/version keyed)

phrase_viz.purpose: Factual Interval records + viz-only colour segment collapse

cue_candidates.purpose: Ranked CueCandidate API with confidence + sources + reasons. 5 cue types.

report.purpose: Per-track CSV + per-mix Markdown rationale reports

mik_reader.purpose: Mixed In Key 11 GEOB tag + SQLite (MIKStore.db) reader — cues, beat grid, energy segments. Tag-only fallback if DB fails

amplitude_analysis.purpose: 1-second RMS envelope analysis: first_drop / first_break / outro_start / clean-loop-window detector + snap_to_mik_or_beat helper

waveform_preview.purpose: Blank-canvas preview PNG for visual-hint authoring (no picks shown)

desktop_analyzer.purpose: Drives MIK + Rekordbox UIs via pywinauto/pyautogui to analyze tracks without manual clicks. Cursor save+restore so Sam can keep working. MIKStore.db + pyrekordbox for completion polling. Requires RB Library Protection OFF.

apply_automation.purpose: Patches volume crossfades (Utility Gain) + EQ bass kills (ChannelEQ LowShelfGain) into a Sections .als. Section-structure-driven bass swap detection (incoming first drop > outgoing outro > outgoing last fill/break > midpoint). Two-phase transition model: incoming ramps up to swap, outgoing fades out after swap. Line-level XML patching, \r\n line endings, dynamic AutomationTarget discovery.

learn_from_correction.purpose: Diffs two Sections .als files (Claude proposal vs Sam correction). Extracts automation envelopes per track, scopes to overlap zones, detects correction patterns (bass_swap_moved, two_stage_bass, two_stage_volume, sneak_changed), appends to pair_history.jsonl. Supports --dry-run for preview.

apply_section_corrections.purpose: Patches .als chop boundaries via XML — 8 attributes per correction

arrange_sections.purpose: Repositions tracks by shifting all clips; natural-fill alignment from sections

sections_blind_viz.purpose: 8-quarter blind PNG renderer for section validation

sessions.focus: V1 warp post-mortem -> gate v3 (Ableton .asd ticks = phase ground truth) -> RB-less rebuild -> In-Key Mix V2 + automated Ableton bounce (Sam's home PC)
key_changes: asd_onsets.py: parse Ableton's cached transient ticks (OnSets/Positions uint32) - sample-accurate phase ruler matching what Sam sees in Live

Gate v3 (validate_beatgrid): phase verdicts/overrides tick-based (12ms PASS/20ms FAIL); librosa phase advisory-only after it mis-corrected 3 healthy RB grids (~100ms track-dependent bias); tick agreement = tempo confirmation
RB-less mode: fit_grids_from_ticks.py + orchestrator [tick-grid] shells + grid-as-BPM-authority (RB/MIK DBs are machine-local; .asd syncs with the project)
choose_warp_mode: Repitch only <=0.05 BPM (was <=1.0 - grid-true BPMs would have detuned 7 tracks)
ableton_ui.py: pyautogui Live driver (DPI + virtual-origin calibrated) - in-app transition eyeball + automated Export Audio/Video bounce
sessions.validation: Suite 84/84; tick probe on In-Key Mix V2.als <=0.8ms every track; DETECT 12/12 + hints gate 44/44; T1/T2/T4/T10/T11 eyeballed in Live (kicks columned, swaps on bar lines); La Trumpter parity restored to validated bars -24ms (hint-diff oracle)
